global.description: The ad features a vibrant design promoting a gaming platform with a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Join the arena for free rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: NeonArena logo
elements.description: A bright, stylized logo featuring the text 'NeonArena' in a bold font, set against a vibrant background.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small, circular decorative element in a contrasting color, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Join the arena text

elements.label: Free rewards text
elements.description: Smaller text below the main headline that reads 'Free rewards for new players', providing additional information.
